# Riku Lauttia — AI Engineer & Founder

> AI engineer and founder building production AI systems, software infrastructure, and AI-native technology ventures.

## Overview

Riku Lauttia is an AI engineer and founder focused on production AI systems, machine learning, software infrastructure, automation, and AI-native ventures. Currently building at the intersection of technical systems and company building.

- Email: riku@lauttia.com
- Status: Available for consulting and partnerships
- Website: https://rikulauttia.com

## Key Pages

https://rikulauttia.com
Overview of current work, selected ventures, writing, and contact.

### About
https://rikulauttia.com/about
Background, education (Aalto University — MSc Machine Learning, Data Science and AI), expertise, and certifications.

### Work Experience
https://rikulauttia.com/work
Professional experience including:
- Software Engineer at Teleste (April 2025 - Present)
- Co-Founder at Since AI (January 2025 - Present)
- Co-Founder at Root (January 2025 - Present)
- Co-Founder at Kolt (July 2024 - Present)
- Co-Founder at Attractor (October 2025 - Present)
- Partnerships Lead at Boost Turku (January 2025 - December 2025)
- Technical Solutions Specialist at VSP (January 2023 - May 2023)

### Projects
https://rikulauttia.com/projects
Active ventures:
- Since AI: AI community and innovation platform connecting builders, companies, research, and capital
- Root: Recruitment and talent platform connecting ambitious technology talent with companies
- Kolt: Automation and operational technology company focused on practical business workflows
- Attractor: Technology consultancy building production-grade software, automation, and AI systems

### Writing
https://rikulauttia.com/writing
Notes on AI, software, systems, and company building:
- "Selling AI Without the Hype: A Playbook for Turning Interest Into Partnerships"
- "AI at the Edge: Why Hardware and Embedded AI Will Decide the Next Decade"
- "From San Francisco to Europe: The 2025 Playbook for Building Agentic AI That Scales"
- "A Social Contract for AI"
- "Europe Must Stay Hungry: Why the Next Decade of AI Will Be Decided Here"

### AI & Machine Learning
Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Neural Networks, Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing, MLOps & AI Infrastructure

Company Building, Strategic Partnerships, Product Strategy, Technical Architecture, Team Leadership, Business Development
